## Change

Describe the behavior and edition boundary affected by this change.

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant tests were added or updated.
- [ ] `make verify` passes.
- [ ] Stored-data or API compatibility impact is documented.
- [ ] Every commit contains `Signed-off-by` and `Flyto2-CLA: accepted` trailers.
- [ ] I read the current source-available license and contributor agreement.
- [ ] Any Cloud-to-Flow backport changes only paths in `FLOW_CLOUD_SYNC.json` and contains no hosted code.
